title: Toy Blast
notes:
Update of Ages!

What happens when Rhino travels thousands of years into the past? A world of caves, stone tools, and friendly cave people is waiting to be explored! Join this timeless adventure in our latest update!

Be sure to update to the latest version of Toy Blast for the newest content. Every 2 weeks, we bring you 50 NEW LEVELS!

Come and have fun!

title: Disney Magic Kingdoms
notes: Race into summer with a new update full of Disney and Pixar magic! Celebrate 20 years of Cars with Season 17 and the Cars Season Pass. Meet Red and Ivy from Cars, Fungus from Monsters, Inc., Hyacinth Hippo from Fantasia, and Kotu from Moana 2. Take on the Tower Challenge for magical rewards, then follow the ocean’s call with the Moana Story Pass and a new costume for Moana. Summer fun awaits in your Kingdom!

title: Golf Clash - Golfing Simulator
notes:
Here's what's new in the latest update:
• Various performance improvements and bug fixes.
• Backend updates.

Thank you for downloading the latest update and happy swinging!

title: Ludo STAR
notes: - Performance Improvements & Bug fixes

title: Tiles Survive!
notes:
[Optimizations & Fixes]
- Added a new "Skip" button to Honor Expedition, allowing Chiefs to instantly complete battles during Quick Challenge.

- Optimized the purchase logic for Arena Challenge Tickets in the VIP Store. When neither Arena nor 3v3 Arena is available, this item can no longer be purchased to prevent accidental Gem spending.

- Improved recruitment animations and the skip experience, and fixed a rare issue that could cause lag during consecutive recruitments.

title: NTE: Neverness to Everness
notes:
Version 1.2 "999 Nights" is now live!
 
1. New Character
Meet the new exclusive S-class character: Shinku
2. New Arc
Introducing the new limited S-Class Arc: "Blushing Mirage"
3. New Content
Introducing a brand-new main story episode, "999 Nights". The party's assembled! Ready to conquer the Warren Continent! 
4. New Gameplay
"Going, Going, Gone": Win big or come up empty. It all rides on the fall of the gavel.
"Shadow-n-Seek": One, two, three... don't move a muscle!
